score_convention: lower model_score_D0 is better; diagnosis uses -model_score_D0 as effective score

candidates.score_formula: Rank 5d reversal ascending after fixed tradability filter: entry_buyable=true, is_suspended=false, no_trade_flag=false, volume_zero_flag=false, amount_zero_flag=false.
candidates.score_direction: ascending 5d return after tradability filter; lower score is better
fail_fast: forbidden label or future field appears
conditional_pass is promoted to full pass
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: It uses a fixed 5d D0 reversal formula and fixed D0 tradability gates, with no p98, no labels, no validation tuning, and no frozen test.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: Removing unbuyable, suspended, no-trade, or zero-volume rows may reduce false top-ranked names that cannot represent a clean D0 head.

candidates.score_formula: Rank 5d reversal ascending within fixed board_type/exchange groups; use the within-group percentile rank as model_score_D0.
candidates.score_direction: ascending board/exchange-neutral 5d reversal rank; lower score is better
fail_fast: forbidden label or future field appears
board/exchange grouping is changed after seeing validation
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: It only normalizes a fixed reversal signal within D0 visible regime groups and does not select groups using outcomes.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: Board and exchange regimes may have different price-limit and liquidity behavior; neutral ranking may avoid concentration in structurally noisy regimes.

candidates.score_formula: Rank 5d reversal ascending after fixed exclusion of D0 limit-state rows: is_limit_up, is_limit_down, open_at_up_limit, or close_at_down_limit.
candidates.score_direction: ascending 5d reversal after limit-state exclusion; lower score is better
fail_fast: forbidden label or future field appears
limit exclusion is tuned from validation
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: The limit-state exclusion is fixed before diagnosis and only uses D0 visible state flags.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: D0 limit-state names can dominate reversal tails while being operationally distorted; fixed exclusion may improve head quality.

candidates.score_formula: Rank 5d reversal ascending among rows with amount_zero_flag=false, volume_zero_flag=false, and same-day amount percentile >= 0.20; amount desc is a fixed tiebreak.
candidates.score_direction: ascending 5d reversal with fixed liquidity quality gate; lower score is better
fail_fast: forbidden label or future field appears
liquidity threshold is tuned from validation
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: The liquidity gate is fixed and uses D0 amount/zero flags only, with no p98 or labels.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: Thin or zero-trade names may generate unstable reversal tails; a fixed quality gate may reduce noisy head names.

candidates.score_formula: Rank 5d reversal ascending among rows with listing_age_days >= 180 calendar days; this is explicitly not trading-day listing age.
candidates.score_direction: ascending 5d reversal after fixed calendar-age gate; lower score is better
fail_fast: calendar proxy is renamed as trading-day age
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: It uses only D0 visible calendar listing age and explicitly refuses the blocked trading-day age fields.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: Very newly listed names may distort reversal head behavior; a conservative calendar-age gate may reduce this noise.

candidates.score_formula: Equal-weight rank average of fixed D0 components: reversal_5d_rank, board-neutral reversal rank, liquidity rank, and tradability penalty. No validation weighting.
candidates.score_direction: ascending fixed composite rank average; lower score is better
fail_fast: forbidden label or future field appears
component weights are changed from fixed equal-weight
candidates.intended_diagnosis: Model-layer train/validation RankIC, ICIR, deciles, TopK proxy, and TopK-minus-nextK only.
candidates.why_it_is_clean: It combines only fixed D0 visible components with fixed equal weights and does not tune from validation outcomes.
candidates.why_it_may_improve_topk_head_quality: A simple composite may keep reversal exposure while reducing operationally weak, illiquid, or regime-concentrated head names.
